NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY; REQ. FOR SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT VARTAN, ALEXANDER ROBERT HEARING SET FOR AUG-21-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALEXANDER VARTAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. ROSA BUZON AND LEE NATHAN BUZON SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), SPECIALLY PREPARED INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), AND DEMAND FOR IDENTIFICATION AND INSPECTION FOR DOCUMENTS (SET ONE) AND PROVIDE FOR INSPECTION OF ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 18, 2013. ALL OBJECTIONS ARE WAIVED FOR FAILURE TO TIMELY SERVE RESPONSES. (CCP 2030.290(A); 2031.300(A).) MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE ISSUED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS AND AGAINST PLAINTIFFS ONLY, AND NOT THEIR COUNSEL, IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 572.00 TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Discovery; Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. NICOLAS GOMEZ JR., TEL. NO. (650) 344-4486 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - MR. GOMEZ INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE IS SUBMITTING TO THE RULING OF THE COURT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER VARTAN's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery; Request For Sanctions is Granted. Rosa Buzon and Lee Nathan Buzon shall serve verified responses, without objection, to Defendant's Form Interrogatories (Set One), Specially Prepared Interrogatories (Set One), and Demand for Identification and Inspection for Documents (Set One) and provide for inspection of all responsive documents no later than September 18, 2013. All objections are waived for failure to timely serve responses. (CCP 2030.290(a); 2031.300(a).) Monetary sanctions are issued in favor of Defendants and against Plaintiffs only, and not their counsel, in the amount of $ 572.00 to be paid within 30 days of this order. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
=(302/MJM)

Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Continued To Aug-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant ALEXANDER VARTAN'S Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery; Request for Sanctions is continued to August 29, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 21, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported.
